course_description: Du lịch & nhiếp ảnh, quá khứ đơn, công nghệ & so sánh, âm nhạc, quá khứ tiếp diễn, sức khỏe và đọc hiểu tổng hợp. Dữ liệu phẳng chuẩn cho pipeline phân tích hành vi học tập.

theory_pages.title: Trang 1 — At the airport
theory_pages.body:
### At the airport

| Từ | Nghĩa |
|----|--------|
| **Flight** | chuyến bay |
| **Ticket / boarding pass** | vé / thẻ lên máy bay |
| **Luggage** | hành lý |
| **Passport** | hộ chiếu |

**Động từ:** *check in*, *take off*, *land*.

**Ngữ cảnh:** *The flight takes off at 9:00 AM.*

theory_pages.title: Trang 2 — Accommodation & transport
theory_pages.body:
### Accommodation & transport

- *Hotel*, *book a room*, *reception*, *tourist*  
- *Rent a car*, *explore*, *arrive*

**Ngữ cảnh:** *We book a room at a hotel near the center.*

theory_pages.title: Trang 3 — Photography
theory_pages.body:
### Photography (hobbies)

- *Camera*, *lens*, *focus*, *zoom*, *landscape*  
- *Take photos / pictures*, *capture*

**Ngữ cảnh:** *I use a mirrorless camera with a 50mm lens to take photos.*

### Gợi ý

Viết 4–5 câu về một chuyến đi tưởng tượng (sân bay → khách sạn → chụp ảnh).

content.reading_passage: Last year I flew to Da Nang. I checked in online and showed my passport at the gate. The flight took off on time. I took photos of the landscape from the window.

vocabulary.vi: hộ chiếu / thẻ lên máy / hành lý
cất cánh / hạ cánh / làm thủ tục
phong cảnh / ống kính / bắt khoảnh khắc

examples.vietnamese: Máy bay hạ cánh lúc 3 giờ chiều.

quizzes.question_text: You need a _____ to travel to another country.
quizzes.hint_text: Passport — giấy tờ xuất nhập cảnh.

quizzes.question_text: The plane leaves the ground. It _____.
I _____ a room at the hotel for two nights.
Ghép đúng: 1. Take — 2. Rent
Sửa: “The flight lands on 9:00 AM.”
The glass part of a camera is the _____.
“Luggage” is a countable noun — we say “luggages”.
quizzes.hint_text: Luggage thường không đếm như vậy (uncountable).

quizzes.question_text: “Máy bay hạ cánh lúc 3 giờ chiều.”

options.D: The plane is land at 3 PM.

quizzes.question_text: Thứ tự hợp lý:
quizzes.hint_text: Làm thủ tục → cất cánh → hạ cánh.

quizzes.question_text: He likes to capture beautiful _____ (landscapes).

theory_pages.title: Trang 1 — Was / Were
theory_pages.body:
### *To be* in the past — **was / were**

- *I / he / she / it + was* — *I was tired yesterday.* (*wasn't*)  
- *You / we / they + were* — *They were at the park.* (*weren't*)

**Dấu hiệu:** *yesterday*, *last night/week*, *… ago* (two days ago).

theory_pages.title: Trang 2 — Regular verbs
theory_pages.body:
### Regular verbs (-ed)

*Play → played*, *work → worked*, *arrive → arrived*

**Khẳng định:** *S + V-ed* — *We walked to the hotel.*

theory_pages.title: Trang 3 — Irregular & did/didn't
theory_pages.body:
### Irregular verbs & questions/negatives

*Go → went*, *have → had*, *buy → bought*, *take → took*

**Phủ định:** *S + didn't + V (nguyên mẫu)* — không chia V sau *didn't*.

**Nghi vấn:** *Did + S + V?*

content.reading_passage: I was busy yesterday. We were at home last night. They went to the park and played football. She didn't buy anything. Did you work last weekend?

vocabulary.vi: quá khứ của be; trợ động từ quá khứ

examples.vietnamese: Anh ấy không ở khách sạn.

quizzes.question_text: I _____ at home last night.
They _____ to Paris last summer.
She (buy) _____ a new lens yesterday.
Sửa: “I didn't went to school.”
_____ you like the movie?
We (work) _____ very hard last week.
Sắp xếp đúng:
The past of “take” is “taked”.
“Anh ấy không ở khách sạn.” (past)

options.C: He not was at the hotel.
options.D: He didn't be at the hotel.

quizzes.question_text: Ghép quá khứ: 1. Have — 2. See — 3. Buy

theory_pages.title: Trang 1 — Pre-reading
theory_pages.body:
### Pre-reading

**Từ:** *temple*, *traditional*, *delicious*, *memory*.

**Ngữ pháp:** Động từ quá khứ — *went, flew, arrived, booked, took, saw, ate, was, didn't …*

theory_pages.title: Trang 2 — Bài đọc
theory_pages.body:
### Reading text

Đọc kỹ đoạn về **chuyến đi Kyoto** — gạch **thời gian** và **hành động**.

theory_pages.title: Trang 3 — Post-reading
theory_pages.body:
### Post-reading — scanning

- Tìm phủ định: *didn't rest*, *didn't buy many souvenirs* — tương phản nghĩa.  
- *Flew* = quá khứ của *fly*.

content.reading_passage: Last month, Alex went to Kyoto, Japan. It was a beautiful trip. He flew from New York and arrived in the morning. He booked a small traditional hotel. On the first day, he didn't rest. He took his mirrorless camera and walked around the city. He saw many old temples and took hundreds of photos. The weather was perfect. In the evening, he ate delicious sushi. He didn't buy many souvenirs, but he had great memories.

vocabulary.vi: đền chùa / truyền thống / quà lưu niệm

quizzes.question_text: Where did Alex go?
He arrived in the evening.
He took a mirrorless _____ to take photos.
What did he do on the first day?
quizzes.hint_text: Didn't rest — walked and took photos.

quizzes.question_text: What did he eat in the evening? — _____
Did he buy many souvenirs?
The base form (infinitive) of “flew” is:
The weather was bad.
He saw many old _____.
The text is about Alex's _____ to Japan.

theory_pages.title: Trang 1 — Hardware & wearables
theory_pages.body:
### Hardware & wearables

*Laptop*, *smartphone*, *screen*, *battery*  
*Smartwatch*, *fitness band*, *sensor*

**Động từ:** *charge*, *connect*

theory_pages.title: Trang 2 — Software & internet
theory_pages.body:
### Software & internet

*Application / app*, *browser*, *cloud*, *network*

**Động từ:** *download*, *install*, *update*, *search*

theory_pages.title: Trang 3 — Data & features
theory_pages.body:
### Data & features

*Feature*, *data*, *speed*, *storage*

**Ngữ cảnh:** *I use my smartwatch to track my health data.*

content.reading_passage: My smartphone has a fast processor. I download apps from the store. I use a browser to search for information. The battery lasts all day. My smartwatch has a heart-rate sensor.

vocabulary.vi: đồng hồ thông minh / cảm biến / trình duyệt

examples.vietnamese: Thiết bị này có nhiều tính năng.

quizzes.question_text: You wear this on your wrist:
When your battery is low, you need to _____ it.
I _____ a new app from the store.
Ghép: 1. Fitness — 2. Cloud
Sửa: “I search the informations on the browser.”
To open a website, you need a _____.
You install hardware (like a screen) from an app store.
“Thiết bị này có nhiều tính năng.”
The opposite of “download” is often _____.
The smartwatch has a _____ to check your heart rate.

theory_pages.title: Trang 1 — Comparatives
theory_pages.body:
### Comparatives (so sánh hơn)

So sánh **hai** đối tượng — thường có **than**.

- Tính từ ngắn: *-er* — *faster*, *cheaper*  
- Tính từ dài: *more + adj* — *more beautiful*, *more expensive*

theory_pages.title: Trang 2 — Superlatives
theory_pages.body:
### Superlatives (so sánh nhất)

So sánh **từ ba** trở lên — thường có **the**.

- Ngắn: *the fastest*, *the cheapest*  
- Dài: *the most beautiful*

theory_pages.title: Trang 3 — Exceptions & irregulars
theory_pages.body:
### Đặc biệt & bất quy tắc

- *y → ier / iest*: *easy → easier → the easiest*  
- Gấp đôi phụ âm: *big → bigger → the biggest*  
- Bất quy tắc: *good → better → the best*; *bad → worse → the worst*; *far → further/farther*

content.reading_passage: This phone is cheaper than that one. It is the most useful app on my phone. The screen is bigger than before.

vocabulary.vi: so sánh hơn / nhất / tính từ ngắn

examples.vietnamese: Đây là chiếc máy ảnh tốt nhất.

quizzes.question_text: A laptop is _____ than a smartphone (usually).
This is _____ app on my phone.
My internet is (fast) _____ than yours.
Sửa: “He is the better student in the class.”
Today the weather is _____ than yesterday.
A smartwatch is (expensive) _____ than a fitness band.
Sắp xếp đúng:
The comparative of “easy” is “easyer”.
“Đây là chiếc máy ảnh tốt nhất.”
Ghép dạng so sánh hơn: 1. Big — 2. Good — 3. Expensive

theory_pages.title: Trang 1 — Pre-reading
theory_pages.body:
### Pre-reading

**Từ:** *compare*, *accurate*, *budget*, *step*.

**Mục tiêu:** So sánh **smartwatch** và **fitness band** — tìm *cheaper*, *smaller*, *more features*…

theory_pages.title: Trang 2 — Bài đọc
theory_pages.body:
### Reading text

Đọc ý **ưu / nhược** của từng thiết bị và **kết luận** (*If you only… / If you want…*).

theory_pages.title: Trang 3 — Post-reading
theory_pages.body:
### Post-reading — argument

- Band: *smaller*, *cheaper*, *battery* tốt.  
- Smartwatch: *bigger screen*, *more features*, *more accurate* (premium).  
- Kết luận theo nhu cầu: đếm bước chân vs “mini computer”.

content.reading_passage: Many people want to track their health. Should you buy a smartwatch or a fitness band? A fitness band is smaller and cheaper than a smartwatch. It is the best choice for a tight budget. It has a great battery. However, a smartwatch has a bigger screen and more features. It can run apps and connect to Wi-Fi. The sensors on a premium smartwatch are often more accurate than a cheap band. If you only want to count your steps, the band is better. If you want a mini computer on your wrist, the smartwatch is the winner.

vocabulary.vi: vòng tay thể thao / cao cấp / chính xác

quizzes.question_text: Which device is cheaper?
quizzes.hint_text: Smaller and cheaper than a smartwatch.

quizzes.question_text: A fitness band has a bigger screen than a smartwatch.
The fitness band is the best choice for a tight _____.
Which usually has more accurate sensors (according to the text)?
quizzes.hint_text: Premium smartwatch sensors more accurate than a cheap band.

quizzes.question_text: A smartwatch can connect to _____.
If you only want to count steps, which is better?
quizzes.hint_text: The band is better for counting steps.

quizzes.question_text: Find a superlative in the text: “It is the _____ choice…”
A smartwatch is described as a kind of mini computer on your wrist.
A fitness band is _____ than a smartwatch.
The text mainly _____ two types of wearables.

theory_pages.title: Trang 1 — Instruments & gear
theory_pages.body:
### Instruments & gear

*Acoustic guitar*, *piano*, *keyboard*, *drums*  
*Amplifier / amp*, *microphone*

**Động từ:** *tune*, *plug in*

theory_pages.title: Trang 2 — Elements
theory_pages.body:
### Musical elements

*Melody*, *rhythm*, *chord*, *lyrics*, *genre*

**Ngữ cảnh:** *He plays a complex chord on his guitar.*

theory_pages.title: Trang 3 — Actions & roles
theory_pages.body:
### Actions

*Practice*, *perform*, *record*, *compose*  
*Producer*, *DAW* (digital audio workstation)

content.reading_passage: She plays the acoustic guitar every weekend. The lyrics of this song are beautiful. He uses an amplifier for his electric guitar. They practice before the concert.

vocabulary.vi: hợp âm / lời bài hát / nhịp

examples.english: He is practicing a new chord.
examples.vietnamese: Anh ấy đang luyện một hợp âm mới.

quizzes.question_text: An instrument with six strings is usually a:
The words of a song are called:
I need an _____ to make my electric guitar louder.
Ghép: 1. Play — 2. Write
Sửa: “He compose a new song yesterday.”
To save your voice or music to a computer, you often _____ it.
“Rhythm” is the same as pitch (how high or low a note is).
“Anh ấy đang luyện tập hợp âm mới.”

options.A: He is practicing a new chord.
options.C: He is practice a new chord.

quizzes.question_text: Logical order for making a song (general):
Ableton Live is popular software used by a music _____.

theory_pages.title: Trang 1 — Past continuous
theory_pages.body:
### Past continuous

**was / were + V-ing** — hành động **đang diễn ra** tại một thời điểm trong quá khứ.

*At 8 PM last night, I was playing the guitar.*

theory_pages.title: Trang 2 — When
theory_pages.body:
### When — hành động cắt ngang

Hành động **dài** (past continuous) + **when** + hành động **ngắn** (past simple).

*I was practicing when the phone rang.*

theory_pages.title: Trang 3 — While
theory_pages.body:
### While — song song

Hai hành động **dài** cùng lúc:

*While I was playing the guitar, he was singing.*

content.reading_passage: At 9 PM yesterday, I was watching TV. When the lights went out, I was reading a book. While my brother was cooking, I was setting the table.

examples.english: I was sleeping when she called.
examples.vietnamese: Tôi đang ngủ thì cô ấy gọi.

quizzes.question_text: At 10 PM yesterday, I _____ TV.
quizzes.hint_text: At a moment in the past → was watching.

quizzes.question_text: I was walking home _____ it started to rain.
_____ I was working, she was reading a book.
Sửa: “When he arrived, I am sleeping.”
The phone _____ while I was taking a shower.
They (play) _____ games at 3 PM yesterday.
Sắp xếp đúng:

options.A: I was studying when you arrived.
options.B: I studying was when you arrived.
options.D: I was study when you arrived.

quizzes.question_text: “We were play football” is correct.
“Tôi đang ngủ thì cô ấy gọi.”

options.A: I was sleeping when she called.
options.C: I am sleeping when she called.

quizzes.question_text: Ghép: 1. Long background action — 2. Short interrupting action

theory_pages.title: Trang 1 — Symptoms
theory_pages.body:
### Symptoms

*Headache*, *stomachache*, *fever*, *cough*, *cold*

**Cấu trúc:** *I have a + noun* — *I have a fever.*

*Feel sick*, *hurt*

theory_pages.title: Trang 2 — Treatment
theory_pages.body:
### Treatment

*Medicine / pill*, *rest*, *see a doctor*, *hospital*

**Động từ:** *take medicine*, *recover*

theory_pages.title: Trang 3 — Lifestyle
theory_pages.body:
### Healthy lifestyle

*Workout / exercise*, *diet*, *nutrition*, *stay hydrated*  
*Mental health*, *reduce stress*

content.reading_passage: I have a headache today. I need to rest and drink water. If I feel worse, I will see a doctor. Exercise and a good diet help my mental health.

examples.english: I feel sick. I need to see a doctor.
examples.vietnamese: Tôi cảm thấy ốm. Tôi cần đi khám bác sĩ.

quizzes.question_text: If your head hurts, you have a _____.
When you are sick, you should _____ medicine.
You should drink water to stay _____.
Ghép: 1. Physical — 2. Mental
Sửa: “I have cough.”
Eating fruit and vegetables is part of a good _____.
“Rest” means you keep working without stopping.
“Tôi cảm thấy ốm. Tôi cần đi khám bác sĩ.”

options.A: I feel sick. I need to see a doctor.
options.B: I feel sick. I need see doctor.
options.C: I am feel sick. I need to see a doctor.
options.D: I feel sickly. I need see a doctor.

quizzes.question_text: Logical order:
Listening to music can reduce _____.

theory_pages.title: Trang 1 — Pre-reading
theory_pages.body:
### Pre-reading

**Từ:** *session*, *background*, *focus*, *inspire*.

**Ngữ pháp:** Quá khứ đơn + quá khứ tiếp diễn + so sánh — trong **một** câu chuyện thu âm.

theory_pages.title: Trang 2 — Bài đọc
theory_pages.body:
### Reading text

The **Rainy Session** — theo dõi *while*, *when*, *than*, *better*, *most productive*.

theory_pages.title: Trang 3 — Post-reading
theory_pages.body:
### Post-reading

- *While* … *was raining* / *While Ben was playing… Sarah was singing*  
- *When* … *was practicing… when Sarah called*  
- So sánh: *the most productive*, *louder than*, *a better singer*, *faster and easier than*

content.reading_passage: Yesterday was the most productive day for Ben. He is a music producer. In the afternoon, he was sitting in his studio while it was raining outside. The sound of the rain was louder than usual, but it inspired him. He was practicing a new chord on his acoustic guitar when his friend, Sarah, called. She is a better singer than him. They decided to record a song. While Ben was playing the guitar and recording on his laptop, Sarah was singing. The session was amazing. It was faster and easier than their last song.

vocabulary.vi: buổi thu / nhà sản xuất / truyền cảm hứng

quizzes.question_text: What was the weather like yesterday?
Ben was playing the piano when Sarah called.
Sarah is a _____ singer than Ben.
What was Ben doing when Sarah called?

options.A: Practicing a chord on his guitar

quizzes.question_text: Where was Ben sitting? — In his _____.
“While Ben was playing, Sarah was singing” describes:
A superlative in the first sentence: “Yesterday was the _____ productive day…”
Recording this song was harder than their last song.
quizzes.hint_text: Faster and easier than their last song.

quizzes.question_text: Ben was recording on his _____.
The text is about a successful music recording _____.
